allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./data/farmwallet-data.json'\); const accs=d.accounts||[]; for\(const a of accs\){ if\(/CMA|농협입출금|ISA/.test\(a.name+a.id+\(a.institution||''\)\)\) console.log\(JSON.stringify\({id:a.id,name:a.name,type:a.type,initialBalance:a.initialBalance,initialCashBalance:a.initialCashBalance,cashAdjustment:a.cashAdjustment,savings:a.savings}\)\);}")
